# CurlyKiddPanel

> FiveM toolkit with server analytics, a community cheater database, mods directory, coordinate lookup and live player tracking for server owners and players.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CurlyKiddPanel features for FiveM players and server owners.
- [Sign in or sign up](/auth): Create an account to access the dashboard and tools.

## Optional

- [Public profile](/user/:id): Public CurlyKiddPanel profile with badges and activity.
